original-actions: Arrives on motorbike and defeats an army of Beetle Drones attacking a refugee family
Rides through the desert searching for survivors
Experiences disturbing hallucinations of his parents and tormented souls at a river
Flees from a spectral armored horseman pursuing him
Camps for the night and cooks a rat for sustenance
Reaches a ruined city filled with rubble and corpses
Encounters the robot assassin Scaramouche and learns his sword was lost
Throws a kunai to destroy Scaramouche's phone before he can report to Aku
Battles a rubble golem animated by Scaramouche's magic
Defeats Scaramouche by throwing his own vibrating sword back at him
Claims Scaramouche's tuning fork sword as his new weapon
Destroys a large Beetle Drone with a single throw of his trident
Crashes his motorcycle into a trap wire and loses his vehicle
Gets brutally beaten and disarmed by the Daughters of Aku
Activates explosives to escape the ambush
Hides inside a destroyed drone while arguing with his younger self's hallucination
Spots a distant temple and runs toward it
Hides in the temple complex while the Daughters search for him
Flees through a basement tomb with coffins and a skeleton king
Grabs the skeleton's battleaxe to defend himself
Kills his first human by slitting a Daughter of Aku's throat
Strikes the hallway walls with the tuning blade causing a rock collapse
Falls into a river below, severely wounded from blood loss
Floats downriver on a log while gravely injured
Crawls to shore and makes his way to a cave
Removes a knife lodged in his side before losing consciousness
Encounters an injured wolf in the cave and passes out again
Bonds with the wolf while recovering from his wounds
Parts ways with the wolf after remembering his father's teachings
Reveals himself to the Daughters of Aku in the snowy forest
Impales one Daughter with a thrown wooden spear from hiding
Kills a second Daughter with another spear
Steals a kanabo from a third Daughter and impales her against a tree
Separates the three remaining Daughters who had grouped together
Lures them onto a fallen tree hanging over a cliff
Sends two Daughters falling to their deaths
Unwraps a chain from his arm during the confrontation with Ashi
Falls into a valley as the tree collapses
Wakes in the snow after surviving the fall
Discovers Ashi's body and follows a blood trail
Fights and restrains Ashi after realizing she survived
Gets swallowed by a giant monster along with Ashi
Saves Ashi from falling inside the monster's body
Attempts to convince Ashi that Aku is the true enemy
Kills blue-green creatures using a severed appendage as a weapon
Rescues Ashi from a red crab-like creature that kidnaps her
Removes needle projectiles from himself and explains acupuncture to Ashi
Creates armor from a centipede's discarded exoskeleton
Saves both of them after Ashi deliberately causes them to fall
Uses flying creatures as transport to escape a fish-like predator
Escapes the monster and lands in the ocean
Swims with Ashi to a desert island
Interacts gently with a ladybug, prompting Ashi's reflection on his nature
Tames a water dragon to transport himself and Ashi to the mainland
Tells Ashi a bedtime story about the creation of stars
Shows Ashi a destroyed forest to demonstrate Aku's evil
Takes Ashi to the City of Aku and steals clothing to disguise them
Demonstrates how Aku welcomes criminals who menace peaceful villages
Encounters a wounded creature who tells him children were kidnapped
Infiltrates a factory with Ashi to rescue enslaved children
Keeps mind-controlled children occupied during combat
Cries out in agony when the children appear dead after their implants short-circuit
Calmly accompanies the mysterious spectral samurai out of the facility
Sits in a cemetery surrounded by ghosts of ancestral samurai in despair
Dodges The Omen's attacks while Ashi intervenes
Regains confidence after Ashi reminds him of everyone he has helped
Defeats The Omen by killing it with the sword intended for his own death
Thanks Ashi and tells her it's time to find his sword
Recounts to Ashi how he lost his sword fifty years ago fighting Aku's corrupted rams
Explores the pit on the back of a giant bird with Ashi
Realizes his sword left him due to spiritual disconnection
Insists on undertaking a solitary spiritual journey to recover his weapon
Journeys through a mystical landscape seeking his sword
Meets a monk who serves tea and teaches him about balance
Confronts his hallucination Mad Jack and recognizes how anger hindered his quest
Achieves spiritual balance and dispels his inner darkness
Meets the gods Odin, Ra, and Rama who deem him worthy
Receives his restored sword and youthful appearance from the gods
Awakens and tells Ashi it's time to confront Aku
Samples market food that temporarily transforms his head into a tropical fish
Boards an enormous camel-like creature for desert transport with Ashi
Recognizes a trap when tiger-men's sweaters spell threatening messages
Fights the tiger-men then escapes the creature to continue on foot
Creates handmade straw hats for himself and Ashi at an oasis
Seeks shelter with Ashi in a crashed spacecraft during a sandstorm
Discovers the ship is actually a prison vessel
Sucks poison from Ashi's bite wound to stop the infection
Battles the Leech Swarm while being pursued through corridors
Cuts a ventilation line to escape via steam
Locates the ship's armory and finds the anti-Lazarus weapon
Removes his gi and drapes it over Ashi to cover her
Figures out the weapon's initiation sequence and electrocutes the creatures
Embraces Ashi in a passionate kiss
Showers outside using a broken water pipe
Opens up emotionally and shares memories of his childhood home with Ashi
Leaves Ashi alone the next morning to protect her from danger
Visits the robot graveyard and discovers The Guardian and time portal destroyed
Confronts Aku and reveals his sword still exists
Fights the transformed demonic Ashi after learning she contains Aku's essence
Breaks Ashi's sword during combat and briefly reaches her humanity
Refuses to kill Ashi despite her pleas and surrenders to Aku
Escapes captivity during an allied attack on Aku's lair
Makes a run for his sword while Aku is distracted
Gets stopped and attacked by the still-controlled Ashi
Confesses his love for Ashi while swallowed by her darkness
Receives his katana from Ashi after she breaks free of Aku's control
Travels through a time portal Ashi creates back to the past
Rushes at the weakened past Aku and stabs him to finish the job
Escapes the collapsing lair with Ashi
Prepares to marry Ashi in a wedding ceremony
Watches Ashi fade from existence as a consequence of Aku's defeat
Mourns alone in the forest over Ashi's erasure
Observes a ladybug and finds peace amid the restored landscape

Seeks shelter with ally in ruins during storm

Sucks poison from ally's wound to prevent death
Battles creatures while being pursued through corridors
